name: io.github.rishirochan/kafka-mcp-server
title: Kafka MCP Server
description: MCP server for Kafka topic management, publishing, consumption, and Schema Registry workflows.

environmentVariables.name: SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Confluent Schema Registry URL used for schema tools and Avro serialization.

environmentVariables.name: AUTO_START_LOCAL_KAFKA
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to auto-start the bundled local Docker Kafka stack on launch.
